description: Bike Index is a nonprofit bicycle registry used to register bikes and help recover stolen ones. It provides search and registration-related data and organization features through its website and APIs.
summary: Bike Index exposes two REST API surfaces on bikeindex.org: the current Bike Index API v3 and deprecated API v2, both using OAuth2 bearer access tokens from Bike Index OAuth applications; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in docs.
